title: Warm Wilted Argentinian Vegetables Tagine
description: A hearty and comforting vegan-friendly dish featuring roasted vegetables, slow-cooked in a clay pot, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon.
instructions: Peel and chop the onion, and place it in the bottom of a ceramic tagine or clay pot, followed by the chopped red bell pepper.
Add the sliced tomatoes and small red potatoes to the pot, topping with the fresh parsley.
Drizzle the olive oil over the vegetables and sprinkle with salt, black pepper, paprika, and chili flakes.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, carefully remove the pot from the oven and pour in the vegan broth.
Return the pot to the oven and continue cooking for another 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the liquid has reduced slightly.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the balsamic vinegar.
Let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving hot, garnished with additional fresh parsley if desired.
